basic_details.job_title: CSIR IGIB Technician Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 15 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: CSIR Institute of Genomics & Integrative Biology (CSIR IGIB)
basic_details.short_information: The CSIR Institute of Genomics & Integrative Biology (CSIR IGIB) has officially announced the Technician (Gr.-II) Recruitment 2026 with 15 openings under Advt. No. 01/2026. Candidates who are not more than 28 years of age and possess a Graduate degree in Genomics, Molecular Medicine, Bioinformatics, Proteomics, or related disciplines are eligible to apply. Interested applicants can submit their online applications on or before 04 July 2026. Selected candidates will receive a salary in the pay scale of ₹19,900–₹63,200. Direct links to download the official notification and apply online are prov

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in Genomics, Molecular Medicine, Bioinformatics and Proteomics.
qualification.details: Graduate in Genomics, Molecular Medicine, Bioinformatics and Proteomics.

salary_details.details: Pay Matrix Level-02, Grade Pay Rs. 1900/-, Rs. 19,900-63,200/- Total Emoluments: 39,970/-

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CSIR IGIB Technician (Gr.-II) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR IGIB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CSIR IGIB Technician (Gr.-II) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CSIR IGIB Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CSIR IGIB Technician (Gr.-II) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CSIR IGIB Technician (Gr.-II) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR IGIB to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CSIR IGIB Technician (Gr.-II) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR IGIB Technician (Gr.-II) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the CSIR IGIB Technician (Gr.-II) Recruitment 2026 is 04-07-2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Technician (Gr.-II) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Graduate degree in Genomics, Molecular Medicine, Bioinformatics, or Proteomics to be eligible for the Technician (Gr.-II) position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants applying for the Technician (Gr.-II) post is 28 years.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Technician (Gr.-II) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 15 vacancies announced for the Technician (Gr.-II) position in the CSIR IGIB Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Technician (Gr.-II) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary in Pay Matrix Level-02, with a Grade Pay of Rs. 1900/-, ranging from Rs. 19,900 to Rs. 63,200/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. In which mode can candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the CSIR IGIB Technician (Gr.-II) Recruitment 2026 must be submitted through the online mode only.

faq.question: Q7. What is the official website of CSIR IGIB?
faq.answer: The official website of CSIR Institute of Genomics & Integrative Biology is https://igib.res.in/. Candidates can visit this site for more information.

faq.question: Q8. Are there any application fees for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the available information, no application fee is mentioned for this recruitment drive. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for confirmation.

faq.question: Q9. When does the online application process begin?
faq.answer: The online application process for the CSIR IGIB Technician (Gr.-II) Recruitment 2026 commences on 05-06-2026.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for the Technician (Gr.-II) position?
faq.answer: The Technician (Gr.-II) position is a Full Time job opportunity at CSIR IGIB.
